name: S Hook without Roller Ball Shower Curtain Rings Chrome - Threshold™: Zinc Alloy, Chrome-Plated, 12-Pack
description:
Whether you're moving into a new place or sprucing up your current decor, make sure all the basics are covered with a set of Chrome Shower Curtain Hooks from Threshold™. These simple S-shaped shower curtain hooks come in a polished silver finish for a touch of shine, and the minimalist design allows you to hang your shower curtain with ease.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
